s2.ptxt: Stop the vehicle on a level surface.
Remove the transmission filler plug and gasket.
Check that the oil surface is within 5 mm (0.20 in.) of the bottom of the transmission filler plug opening.

item.ptxt: Excessively large or small amounts of oil may cause trouble.
After replacing the oil, drive the vehicle and check the oil level again.

atten4.ptxt: Insert your finger into the filler plug hole. You should be able to just touch the surface of the oil if the oil is at the correct level.

s2.ptxt: Check for oil leakage if the oil level is low.
Install the transmission filler plug and a new gasket.
